steps.title: Find withheld comfort
steps.content: The claim says Henry does not always comfort Jimmie after Jimmie is scolded. The best quotation must show Henry refusing sympathy or responding harshly to Jimmie rather than offering solidarity.

steps.title: Match the harsh response
steps.content: A describes Jimmie admiring Henry's work, not Henry responding to Jimmie's shame. B shows Henry usually offering solidarity by naming one of his own faults. D describes Jimmie avoiding Henry when Henry feels guilty. The quotation about Henry repudiating, bullying, and preaching at Jimmie shows scolding instead of comfort, not reassurance after a reprimand. The answer is C.
